title: Buqqiyah #1232
definition:
Bukkiah = "Jehovah has emptied"

 1) a Kohathite Levite, of the sons of Heman, one of the musicians in
    the temple
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bukkiah = "Jehovah has emptied"

 1) a Kohathite Levite, of the sons of Heman, one of the musicians in
    the temple

    NASB:  proved of Yah, a Levite
